mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ORDER ( CUSTOMER_ID, ORDER_STATUS, ORDER_MEMO, ORDERED_AT ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, 'CREATED', #{memo}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT O.ORDER_ID AS orderId, O.CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, O.ORDER_STATUS AS status, O.ORDERED_AT AS orderedAt FROM TB_ORDER O JOIN TB_ORDER_ITEM OI ON O.ORDER_ID = OI.ORDER_ID JOIN TB_PRODUCT P ON OI.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE O.ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
SELECT ORDER_ID AS orderId, CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, ORDER_STATUS AS status, ORDERED_AT AS orderedAt FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDERED_AT >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 ORDER BY ORDERED_AT DESC
